extraction.one_line_summary: GROVES Kaden won bunch sprint after crosswinds shredded peloton, YATES Simon and PORTE Richie lost significant time in splits
tactical_patterns: BikeExchange split sprint duties: MATTHEWS Michael paced final kilometer while GROVES Kaden wheel-surfed BAUHAUS Phil before attacking.
INEOS drove hard through crosswind sections protecting multiple GC options, proving depth strategy effective when weather dictates tempo.
Quick-Step positioned VERNON Ethan for sprint despite GC focus, showing willingness to contest stages when peloton fractures unexpectedly.

rider_signals.YATES Simon: negative: caught behind in crosswind splits, entire team except MATTHEWS and GROVES dropped back to pace him
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: negative: unwell, told teammates via radio not to wait for him, abandoned GC ambitions Stage 2
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: positive: tactically superior sprint, wheel-surfed BAUHAUS then timed final acceleration perfectly against stronger headwind rider
rider_signals.BAUHAUS Phil: neutral: led out own sprint without team support in final 2km, strong but tactically isolated
rider_signals.MATTHEWS Michael: positive: sacrificed sprint finish to pace GROVES in leader's jersey, executed dual-role perfectly
rider_signals.RODRÍGUEZ Carlos: negative: crashed and required sustained pacing from INEOS teammates, vulnerability on technical flat roads
